x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Customer business rules and client scripts on HR case tables can conflict with Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions. High customization counts increase deployment risk.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_hr_core_case. Test Now Assist HRSD with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating redundant scripts before Now Assist go-live.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_43f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c69
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Customer business rules and client scripts on HR case tables can conflict with Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions. High customization counts increase deployment risk.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Customization Risk</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBR = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    gaBR.addQuery('collection', 'sn_hr_core_case');
    gaBR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaBR.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaBR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBR.query();
    var brs = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCS = new GlideAggregate('sys_script_client');
    gaCS.addQuery('table', 'sn_hr_core_case');
    gaCS.addQuery('active', true);
    gaCS.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaCS.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCS.query();
    var cs = gaCS.next() ? parseInt(gaCS.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var risk = brs + cs;
    var actualValue = brs + ' custom BRs + ' + cs + ' client scripts on HR case (risk score: ' + risk + ')';

    if (risk <= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low HR customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions are unlikely to encounter conflicts with existing customizations.'
        };
    } else if (risk <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Moderate HR customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Test Now Assist HRSD in sub-production before enabling in production to identify conflicts.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High HR customization risk (score: ' + risk + '). Extensive customization on sn_hr_core_case increases the risk of conflicts with Now Assist HRSD AI Agent actions.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000406</number><order>140</order><remediation_guidance>Review custom Business Rules and Client Scripts on sn_hr_core_case. Test Now Assist HRSD with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating redundant scripts before Now Assist go-live.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>43f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c69</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Customization Risk</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_43f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c69</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
